sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 12:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 12:1
items.html: Through two couplings that are induced in Malchut of the Rosh, ZON acquire the strength to descend to clothe in the Guf and generate offspring. (Inner Light, Item 3)
